name: Rolled Oats Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour hot water and sweetened condensed milk over the rolled oats and let stand for half an hour.
2. Add corn syrup, cooking oil, and beaten egg yolks to the oat mixture.
3. Sift together flour, baking powder, and salt.
4. Gradually add the sifted ingredients to the oat mixture until smooth.
5. Fold in stiffly beaten egg whites.
6. Fill well-oiled muffin tins about 2/3 full.
7. Bake in a hot oven (425°F) for 20 minutes.
